# @pondoknusa/reusable-components

Reusable .tyr view components for Pondoknusa applications

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/reusable-components
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `3.1.0` |
| Source | [`packages/reusable-components`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/reusable-components) |
| Category | Other packages |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@pondoknusa/views](/reference/generated/packages/views)

## Public exports

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.
